text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Rice Shower is depressed about Mihono
Bourbon's injury but, after a run with Tannhauser,
she remembers how much fun running is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Intent on getting even better before Mihono
Bourbon returns, Rice Shower starts training again
and improves rapidly.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mihono Bourbon, also depressed about her
injury, finds courage watching Rice Shower train.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser realizes that Rice Shower is
the star who gives Mihono Bourbon strength.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She repeats the word "star" over and over again
to herself... It has a profound impact on her.
